creator: freebsd@jdc.parodius.com
text:
During the configure stage of the port, the following warning
	is emit:

===>  Patching for sudo-1.7.3
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for sudo-1.7.3
===>  Configuring for sudo-1.7.3
configure: WARNING: unrecognized options: --disable-log-wrap

	CONFIGURE_ARGS contains --disable-log-wrap, which was
	officially removed.

Fix: 

Remove --disable-log-wrap from CONFIGURE_ARGS.
How-To-Repeat: 	See above.
